data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the room scan requirement, specifically a 360 camera view, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied through API reads or persisted state checks. The absence of concrete evidence regarding the room scan functionality indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of room scan validation or confirmation of 360 camera view.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for room scan validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the room scan requirement.
